q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: pickle.loads is an unsafe parser that can execute arbitrary code (RCE) from untrusted input.

mock_guidance.capture: The raw bytes argument passed to pickle.loads on line 73.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a benign, empty dictionary (matching the constant fallback on line 72) or a predefined safe mock object instead of actually deserializing the payload.
notes: Mocking pickle.loads is critical to prevent arbitrary code execution during test harness execution.
The captured raw bytes can be separately analyzed or validated in the test assertion.
